steps: Tryptone - 10 g NaCl - 10 g Yeast extract - 5 g Deionized water q.s.p. - 1 L Tryptone (pancreatic digest of casein) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #T9410 NaCl Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #53014 BD Bacto™ Yeast Extract Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #212750
Dissolve all components in deionized water. Adjust pH of solution with NaOH 5 N (~ 0.2 mL). Autoclave for 15 min @ 120 °C (1.2 atm).
creator: Diego Bonatto
